phase: brownfield improvement — app renamed to Ragion, tagline added
completed_this_session: App renamed from RAGFlowMobile / RAGFlow to Ragion across all targets (main app, widget, share extension)

Updated display strings in KBStatusWidget.swift, RecentChatWidget.swift, ShareViewController.swift, ContentView.swift
Updated SplashView.swift: app name 'Ragion' + tagline 'Where retrieval meets reason'
Updated OnboardingView.swift: title/headers updated to Ragion branding + tagline on welcome page
prior_session_completed: Compiled full prioritized backlog from CONTRIBUTING.md + FEATURE_COMPARISON.md (High/Medium/Low + feature gaps by category)
Saved realsave shorthand command to auto-memory: mempalace mine → save → /deft:checkpoint → commit all → push remote
Saved project_backlog.md to auto-memory with full backlog summary
FEATURE_COMPARISON.md note: stamped iOS 0.3.0 but current is 0.8.0 — Categorize, Switch, Variable Assigner, DuckDuckGo/Wikipedia, Workflow export already done and excluded from backlog
Fixed LLM error surfacing: OpenAIService + OllamaService split non-HTTP / non-200 guards with descriptive serverError messages
Fixed ClaudeService.badResponse description: now says 'unrecognised response — check API key and network'
Fixed KB tap on iPhone (task 12): replaced 3 competing navigationDestination registrations with single KBNavDest wrapper + navigationDestination(item:)
Fixed Skip / workflow tap not working on SplashView: added onChange(of: hasCompletedOnboarding) to dismiss fullScreenCover and call onDismiss()
Fixed WorkflowListView navigation: Button + navigationDestination(item: $selectedWorkflow) replaces broken NavigationLink
Added Hashable to Workflow model (required by navigationDestination(item:))
Fixed widget/share extension version mismatch: both Info.plist files bumped to 0.8.0 / build 8
Added shared Xcode schemes to xcshareddata/xcschemes/ (RAGFlowMobile, RAGFlowShareExtension, RAGFlowWidget)
Fixed DOCX import ZIPError 0: added OLE magic byte check (0xD0 0xCF 0x11 0xE0) for legacy .doc detection; wrapped all ZipError in descriptive OfficeError.unzipFailed
Added .doc extension routing in RAGService → IngestError.unsupportedLegacyDoc with helpful user message
Fixed OfficeParser extractWText: regex '\\s+' → '[ \\t]+' to preserve paragraph newlines
Added New Chat button (task 18): square.and.pencil toolbar item in ChatView calls onNewChat closure
Updated OnboardingView to 0.8.0 (task 17): GEDCOM/ZIP on import page, New Chat on Chat page, 30+ formats, KB export/import bullet
Fixed all tooltips multiline (task 19): SettingHelpButton popover uses fixedSize + multilineTextAlignment + minWidth:220
Added 50-doc cap per KB (task 20): LibraryViewModel enforces cap on all ingest paths; count badge in LibraryView turns orange ≤5 slots
Added DocumentCameraView cap check before OCR
Added workflow export/import (task 16): context menu + leading swipe on WorkflowListView rows
Fixed stale KB snapshot in retrieveChunks (task — topK always 10): re-fetches live KB from DB at query time via db.kb(id:)
Mempalace audit + cleanup: pruned 202 stale vbrief drawers (raw session transcript noise); wrote diary entry; palace now 444 clean drawers
Registered custom UTTypes for .ragflow-kb and .ragflow-workflow in Info.plist (UTExportedTypeDeclarations + CFBundleDocumentTypes)

key_facts.archive_note: xcodebuild archive from terminal fails with errSecInternalComponent (keychain locked) — use Xcode GUI: set destination to Any iOS Device (arm64) via Product > Destination, then Product > Archive
key_facts.retrieval_fix_note: ChatViewModel.retrieveChunks now calls db.kb(id:) to get live KB settings — fixes topK/topN/threshold always showing init-time defaults
key_facts.rename_note: Display name is Ragion everywhere; internal code/bundle IDs remain com.dhorn.ragflowmobile / RAGFlowMobile — no bundle ID change needed
